scripts.build: npm run -w @ai-editor/editor-client build && npm run -w @ai-editor/vscode-extension build
scripts.test: npm run -w @ai-editor/editor-client test && npm run -w @ai-editor/vscode-extension test
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @ai-editor/editor-client typecheck && npm run -w @ai-editor/vscode-extension typecheck
